title: Invite Banner Animation
description: Which animation approach works best for the Invite Friends banner? Three explorations: an attention-grabbing glow, a decorative border draw, and a subtle shimmer.

options.title: Glow Pulse
options.description: Attention loop - pulsing shadow glow radiating from the banner, repeats 3 times over 2s to draw the eye without being intrusive.

options.title: Border Draw
options.description: Delight - spinning conic gradient border in blue tones that traces the banner perimeter, with fade-in/out transitions.

options.title: Shimmer Sweep
options.description: Delight - horizontal light sweep across the banner using a white gradient overlay, left to right.
